mnemonics.title: Matrix for Many Edges
mnemonics.content: Use an Adjacency Matrix when the graph is Dense (has Many edges). Think M for Matrix and M for Many.

mnemonics.title: List for Lean Graphs
mnemonics.content: Use an Adjacency List when the graph is Sparse (is Lean on edges). Think L for List and L for Lean.

mnemonics.title: Symmetric Smile
mnemonics.content: Remember that an Undirected graph's matrix is Symmetric. Think of a smile—both sides are the same.
